prTitle: fix(tui): provide the JetBrains terminal capabilities (closes #31)
prBody:
Ports upstream commit 4bbe295 (earendil-works/pi#5037) to otto-cli.

Adds `TERMINAL_EMULATOR` env detection so JetBrains JediTerm
(WebStorm/IntelliJ terminal) gets truecolor without hyperlinks.

Closes #31. Auto-filed by upstream-cherry-pick; landed by
upstream-swarm on 2026-06-05.
